laneLabelNote: 31B is the dense scale target after E2B per docs/hardware-validation-appendix.md section 'Target order'. It is NOT a MoE lane; NOT a first-validation target; NOT an efficiency lane. Dense means every parameter contributes to every token.
purpose: Pin the canonical bundle for 31B-dense real-weight layer-block parity. Parallels config/gemma-4-e2b-real-weight-fixture.json; 31B is the scale target after E2B per docs/hardware-validation-appendix.md. Every hash below pins the 31B program so the parity harness rejects fixture drift at validate-time.

modelShape.note: Manifest-shape 31B has headDim=160, numHeads=32. Current layer-block kernel runs smoke shape (headDim=8, numHeads=8, size=1024). A real-weight receipt at manifest shape needs the head-dim rewrite before numerical parity claims are meaningful. Until that lands, any 31B real-weight run must be labeled 'real_weight_smoke_shape'.

input.note: Canonical initial_rows at smoke size 1024. Same fixture as E2B — both models run the same layer-block kernel under smoke shape.

weightsDir.contract: Two files per layer in [0, numLayers). At smoke shape size=1024 each file is 4096 bytes. At manifest shape headDim=160*numHeads=32=5120, per-file bytes scale accordingly. Validator cross-checks file sizes against modelShape via bench/tools/validate_weights_dir.py --shape manifest.
weightsDir.expectedWeightSetSha256Note: Pinned when an extractor lands. Null today.

smokeContract.projectionSubstituteTensorRationale: Gemma 4 31B has no per_layer_projection.weight (E2B-only learned tensor). pre_feedforward_layernorm.weight is per-layer learned state, structurally adjacent to E2B's projection slot (sits before the FFN), and produces a distinct per-layer hash so the smoke audit retains layer-level differential signal. Other candidates (post_feedforward_layernorm.weight, input_layernorm.weight) sit further from the E2B slot; zero-pad destroys per-layer differential; deleting the projection from the smoke contract requires audit code change. See bench/out/r3-1-31b-real-weight-smoke-extraction-preflight/receipt.json for the option set.
smokeContract.linearAttentionPolicyRationale: A subset of 31B layers lack self_attn.v_proj.weight (linear / sliding-window attention). 'skip-with-layout-metadata' omits the v_proj concat for those layers and records kv_layout='linear' per layer in the materialization metadata so the audit accepts the layer as complete-by-policy. Mirrors HostPlan's existing kv_write vs kv_write_shared split. 'dup-k-into-v' is structurally dishonest (v_proj slot looks like v_proj but is a copy of k_proj). 'fail' kills smoke as the bridge to real-weight execution.

claimScope.claimable: Same bundle-identity run across three lanes with real 31B weights, bit-exact or within-atol output parity at the stated chain depth.
notClaimable: Cerebras hardware performance (until hardware_success receipt lands)

stopShipIf: bundle.manifest.sha256 or bundle.graph.sha256 diverges from recorded value
input.sha256 on disk diverges from recorded value
weightsDir.expectedWeightSetSha256 is set but a candidate dir produces a different sha
any lane reports a manifest/graph sha different from this fixture's bundle
